my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation import with jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 17.
Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes required for Spring Boot 3.
Replace Hibernate5Module with Hibernate6Module to align with the upgraded Hibernate version in the Java 17 environment.
my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.human_impl: import com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.hibernate6.Hibernate6Module; ... public Hibernate6Module hibernate6Module() { return new Hibernate6Module(); }

my-workspace/server/src/main/java/com/my.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableWebSecurity and @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with Spring Security 6 compatible @Configuration and @EnableMethodSecurity.
Update servlet imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers using MvcRequestMatcher for Spring Security 6 compatibility.
Replace manual CorsFilter injection with Spring Security 6's .cors(withDefaults()) DSL.
Update CSRF configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and integrate a custom SpaCsrfTokenRequestHandler.
Update OAuth2 Login configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL and configure OIDC user service.
Update OAuth2 Resource Server configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL for JWT authentication.
Update OAuth2 Client configuration to use the new lambda-based DSL with defaults.
